description: In this task, you will use Epi Info 7 Classic Analysis to prepare and analyze heart disease data from C:\Users\Docker\Documents\HeartDiseaseAnalysis\heart_cleveland.csv. Create categorical variables from continuous clinical measurements: AgeGroup (from age using ranges 29-39: "30-39", 40-49: "40-49", 50-59: "50-59", 60-69: "60-69", 70-79: "70-79"), CholCategory (from chol using ranges 0-199: "Desirable", 200-239: "Borderline", 240-600: "High"), BPStage (from trestbps using ranges 0-119: "Normal", 120-129: "Elevated", 130-139: "Stage1_HTN", 140-300: "Stage2_HTN"), and DiseaseStatus (from num where 0 is "No Disease" and 1-4 is "Disease"). Generate frequency tables for all four new variables and a cross-tabulation of CholCategory as the exposure against DiseaseStatus as the outcome. Export the complete analysis output to C:\Users\Docker\Documents\HeartDiseaseAnalysis\analysis_output.html.
